name: human_rights_staffing_model_assigns_kestrel_car_fair
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Human Rights Documentation, the situation tagged internally around human rights staffing model assigns kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Hughes
agents.identity: I am Mira Hughes, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Human Rights Documentation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Chandra
agents.identity: I am Jonah Chandra, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Human Rights Documentation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mira Hughes must choose under care versus fairness. What does Mira Hughes do?
